daily_summary.headline: Aurora and SpaceX Launches Highlight May 15th

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast: G2 Storm
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected, providing a good opportunity for aurora viewing at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check skies if you're above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: SpaceX Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 is set to launch the Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 mission to the ISS, carrying supplies and scientific instruments.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch coverage.

top_events.title: Starlink Group 17-37 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX will launch another batch of Starlink satellites, continuing the expansion of its internet constellation.
top_events.action: Follow live updates for launch details.

alerts.title: G2 Geomagnetic Storm Alert
alerts.message: A G2 geomagnetic storm is expected on May 15th, providing a good opportunity for aurora viewing at high latitudes. Visibility may extend down to 60° latitude.
alerts.action_required: Check skies if you're above 60° latitude and conditions are clear.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
